SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2025 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE COURT'S CALENDAR CONDITION TO OCT-14-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. BY VISITING JUDGE CECILIA CASTELLANOS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF FLORENCE DENISE THURMAN IS NOT PRESENT (NOTIFIED BY PHONE). DEFENDANT HECTOR FLAMENCO NOT PRESENT (NOTIFIED BY PHONE). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: DUE TO THE COURT'S CALENDAR CONDITION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-14-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-14-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. PLAINTIFF FLORENCE DENISE THURMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HECTOR FLAMENCO DBA ALL CLAIMS PRO CONSTRUCTION LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-14-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THURMAN, FLORENCE DENISE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLAMENCO, HECTOR DBA ALL CLAIMS PRO CONTRUCTION LLC $3,734.43 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,984.43 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
